title: Fix expired-session redirect
spec_text:
## Goal
Expired sessions redirect users to login while preserving the original destination.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Expired sessions return HTTP 302 to /login.
- The redirect includes a next query parameter with the original path.
- Authenticated sessions continue to access the protected route.

## Out of Scope
- Changing password reset behavior.
- Replacing the authentication middleware architecture.
- Disabling authentication checks.

## Risk Areas
- authentication
- session handling

## Expected Scope
small_bugfix

title: Pin billing webhook dependency safely
spec_text:
## Goal
Pin the billing webhook client dependency to a safe compatible version without weakening signature verification.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Dependency version is pinned to a non-vulnerable compatible range.
- Webhook signature verification remains required.
- Existing webhook tests continue to cover invalid signatures.
- Configuration changes are documented for operators.

## Out of Scope
- Replacing the payment provider.
- Disabling webhook signature checks.
- Changing invoice creation semantics.

## Risk Areas
- billing
- dependency management
- webhook security

## Expected Scope
medium_change
